judgment.summary: Strong growth estimates and solid margins are tempered by a high trailing P/E and modest current returns.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 4.1%; next earnings date is 2026-08-03.
positives: Analyst growth estimates are strong for the current quarter (34.8%) and fiscal year (31.5%).
Gross margin (42.7%) and operating margin (18.2%) are robust.
Forward P/E of 25.38 is significantly lower than trailing P/E of 79.34, indicating expected earnings growth.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $1.28B and a healthy current ratio (4.87) suggest good liquidity.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 79.34 is exceptionally high, suggesting the stock may be overvalued based on current earnings.
Return on equity (7.5%) and return on assets (6.8%) are relatively modest.
Total debt ($3.25B) is higher than total cash ($2.40B), though the Debt/Equity ratio (44.34) is manageable.
Mean analyst target ($103.97) is below the current spot price ($107.90).

news.paragraph: ON Semiconductor was cited as a favored stock among hedge funds last month, according to Hazeltree data. This news suggests positive institutional sentiment, though it does not provide specific catalysts or guidance updates for the company itself. Traders should consider this flow of funds as a backdrop to any individual company news or upcoming earnings.

headlines.title: Tech leaders favoured by hedge funds last month, Hazeltree says

examples.body: $MX is the next 30x chip stock if you missed your chance with $MU $NVDA or $ON
$ON get out while you still can. If you drill into that acquisition rumor you will find it’s nothing more than a rumor. The likelihood of it going through is 0…
$ON out with a 2 dollar profit per share now short
$CPRI $MU $ON $970% already for $MU; congrats 🔆🌿🌟 Checkout $PHR and $RXRX for similar potential for longs. Do your DD and get in. Now undervalued.
